description: Planning department operating loop from external signals to internal requirements.

core_objects.signals: External facts and observed industry moves. Stored through raw_items/news_items.
core_objects.insights: Human or model-assisted interpretation of why the signal matters.
core_objects.strategic_implications: What the signal may mean for company strategy, product, capability, competition or risk.
core_objects.requirements: Internal planning/product/research/operation needs created from one or more insights.
core_objects.tasks: Assigned follow-up work for owners, with status and due date.

report_item_strategy_loop_v1.permission_rule: Creating a strategy loop from a report item requires workspace admin+ because it creates a requirement and may create a task.
report_item_strategy_loop_v1.derivation_rule: The API derives news/raw/source links from the daily or weekly report item generated_news chain; weekly report items that reference a daily item preserve both weekly_report_item_id and daily_report_item_id on the requirement source link.
report_item_strategy_loop_v1.task_trace_rule: Topic task read models include requirement_source_links so a task can navigate back to requirement, report item, news, raw and source.

insight_management_v1.insight_create_rule: Creating an insight requires a news_item_id in the same workspace; the API derives raw_item_id from the news item and rejects conflicting raw_item_id.
insight_management_v1.implication_create_rule: Creating a strategic implication requires an existing insight and inherits workspace_code/domain_code from that insight.
insight_management_v1.status_rule: Insights can be listed, confirmed, linked_to_requirement and archived without losing report/news/raw trace.

task_assignment_v1.assignee_rule: When assignee_user_id is provided on create/update, it must reference an active enabled member of the same workspace.
task_assignment_v1.notification_rule: Changing assignee_user_id from another value to a non-empty value emits task.assigned and creates an in-app notification for the new assignee, excluding self-assignment by the actor.

filter_params: assignee (me resolves to the current user; any other value is treated as a user id)
task_owner_view_v1.overdue_rule: A task is overdue when due_at is before server utc_now and status is not done or canceled.
task_owner_view_v1.assignee_update_rule: The current assignee may update status and metadata_json.blocked_reason only; title, due_at, assignee_user_id, requirement_id and arbitrary metadata remain workspace admin+ only.

task_batch_update_v1.task_ids_rule: At least one and at most 100 topic task ids; all ids must exist in the same workspace_code.
task_batch_update_v1.update_rule: Batch update only supports status and topic_tasks.metadata_json.blocked_reason. It must not update title, due_at, assignee_user_id, requirement_id or arbitrary metadata.
task_batch_update_v1.admin_rule: Workspace admin+ may batch update any selected tasks in the workspace, including overdue and blocked queues.
task_batch_update_v1.assignee_rule: The current assignee may batch update only tasks assigned to themselves, with the same status/blocked_reason limit as single task update.

task_detail_v1.permission_rule: Workspace viewer+ can read a task detail in their workspace. Non-members must receive 403 and unknown ids must receive 404.
task_detail_v1.trace_rule: The task detail response must include requirement source links so the frontend detail drawer can navigate from task -> requirement -> report item/news/raw/source without a second ad hoc lookup.
task_detail_v1.frontend_behavior: The /tasks page opens a read-only detail drawer from list rows or task_id query anchors; status and assignment mutations continue to use the existing update endpoints.

sync_boundary_v1.feed_rule: Requirements and topic tasks must not appear in extranet sync feed object_types, even if a row has public visibility_scope or public_to_intranet sync_policy.

requirement_owner_status_v1.owner_rule: When owner_user_id is provided on create/update, it must reference an active enabled member of the same workspace.
requirement_owner_status_v1.notification_rule: Changing requirements.status emits requirement.status_changed and creates an in-app notification for owner_user_id, excluding status changes made by the owner.

requirement_feedback_to_recommendation_v.source_derivation: Requirement source links derive target news_item_id from direct news links, report item generated_news, insight.news_item_id, or raw_item_id -> news_items.
requirement_feedback_to_recommendation_v.recommendation_read_rule: Recommendation scoring reads editorial_actions with action_type=requirement.feedback_to_recommendation into feedback_score and recommendation_reason.

requirement_source_link_v1.derivation_rule: When a report item, generated news, insight, entity milestone, historical report, historical feedback, news, or raw source is supplied, the API derives the related news_item_id and raw_item_id when available; conflicting explicit source ids must be rejected.
requirement_source_link_v1.workspace_rule: A requirement source link target must belong to the same workspace as the requirement.
requirement_source_link_v1.permission_rule: Creating or adding requirement source links requires workspace admin+; listing source links requires workspace viewer+.

permission_model_v1.update_topic_task_status: workspace admin+ or the current assignee
permission_model_v1.update_topic_task_blocked_reason: workspace admin+ or the current assignee, limited to metadata_json.blocked_reason for assignees
permission_model_v1.batch_update_topic_tasks: workspace admin+ for workspace tasks, or current assignee for own tasks only; fields limited to status and blocked_reason

required_links: insights.source_report_item_id -> daily_report_items.id or weekly_report_items.id by source_report_type
rule: A requirement must be traceable back to the external signals that motivated it.
